title: cyclosorus decorus
intro: Cyclosorus decorus, also known as the Decorous Fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus decorus include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas or infusions, or used in traditional remedies such as poultices and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
